subject: 本月 Pro 套餐被重复扣费
body: 你好，我的 Pro 套餐本月出现两笔相同扣款，请核对账单并退回重复收取的费用。

subject: 申请退回误购买的年度套餐
body: 我今天误操作购买了年度套餐，尚未使用任何高级功能，请问能否取消订单并办理退款？

subject: 重复支付后的退款进度
body: 上周反馈的重复支付已经确认，但目前还没有收到退款。请帮我查询处理进度和预计到账时间。

subject: 试用期结束后自动扣款希望退订
body: 我没有注意到试用期已经结束，系统自动收取了套餐费用。我希望终止订阅并申请退回本次款项。

subject: Duplicate charge on my Pro subscription
body: I was charged twice for the same Pro subscription renewal. Please verify the two transactions and refund the duplicate payment.

subject: Refund request for an accidental annual purchase
body: I accidentally selected the annual plan this morning and have not used it. Please cancel the order and issue a refund.

subject: Refund has not arrived
body: Support confirmed my duplicate payment last week, but the refund has not reached my account. Can you check its status and expected arrival date?

subject: Trial converted to a paid subscription
body: My trial converted to a paid plan before I noticed the reminder. I would like to cancel the subscription and request a refund for this charge.

subject: 申请开具企业增值税发票
body: 我们需要为六月的团队套餐开具企业发票，请告知需要提供哪些抬头、税号和开票资料。

subject: 账单中的税费金额不一致
body: 本月账单显示的税费和付款页面不一致，请协助核对税率及最终应付金额。

subject: 企业采购合同和付款流程咨询
body: 我们计划采购五十个账号，需要合同、报价单和对公付款信息，请说明企业采购需要准备的资料。

subject: 下载历史账单和付款凭证
body: 财务审计需要去年十二月的账单和付款收据，请问在哪里下载，或者能否重新发送？

subject: VAT invoice for our team plan
body: We need a company invoice for our June team subscription. Please tell us which legal name, tax number, and billing details are required.

subject: Tax amount differs from checkout
body: The tax shown on our monthly bill is different from the amount displayed at checkout. Could you verify the rate and final total?

subject: Enterprise contract and purchase documents
body: We plan to purchase fifty seats and need a quotation, contract, and bank transfer instructions. What documents are required for enterprise procurement?

subject: Need an old receipt for audit
body: Our finance audit requires the invoice and payment receipt from last December. Where can I download them or request another copy?

subject: 重置密码后仍然不能登录
body: 我已经重新设置密码，但登录页面一直提示凭据无效。请帮我检查账号状态和登录方法。

subject: 密码重置链接已过期
body: 刚收到的密码重置链接打开后提示 token 无效，请问如何重新获取有效链接？

subject: SSO 登录循环跳转
body: 公司启用 SSO 后，成员登录时会在认证页和工作区之间循环跳转，请协助排查配置。

subject: 成员访问权限突然失效
body: 一个团队成员昨天还能进入项目，今天访问时提示没有权限。管理员没有主动修改角色，请帮助调查。

subject: Cannot log in after password reset
body: I reset my password successfully, but the login page still says the credentials are invalid. Please check my account status.

subject: Password reset token expired
body: The password reset link I just received reports an invalid token. How can I request a fresh link?

subject: SSO login redirect loop
body: After enabling SSO, our members keep moving between the identity provider and workspace without completing login. Please help inspect the setup.

subject: Member access suddenly stopped working
body: A team member could open the project yesterday but now receives a permission error. No administrator changed the role. Can you investigate?

subject: Pro 套餐是否支持团队权限和审计日志
body: 我们准备升级到 Pro 套餐，想确认是否支持多人工作区、统一权限管理、审计日志和 Webhook 集成。

subject: 团队版能否对接现有系统
body: 请问团队套餐是否提供 API、Webhook 和 SSO，方便和我们内部的身份及数据系统集成？

subject: 不同套餐的协作能力区别
body: 我们有十五名成员，需要共享工作区并按角色分配权限。哪个套餐更适合这种使用场景？

subject: 审计日志可以保留哪些操作
body: 产品的审计日志功能会记录登录、成员变更和 API 操作吗？我们主要用于企业合规检查。

subject: Does Pro include team permissions and audit logs?
body: We are considering the Pro plan and need team workspaces, centralized permissions, audit logs, and Webhook integrations. Are these features included?

subject: Integration capabilities for the team plan
body: Does the team plan provide API, Webhook, and SSO support so we can connect our identity and data systems?

subject: Which plan supports a shared workspace?
body: We have fifteen members who need one workspace with role-based permissions. Which plan is suitable for this use case?

subject: What actions are included in audit logs?
body: Do product audit logs record logins, member changes, and API operations? We need this feature for compliance reviews.

subject: 第三次反馈仍然没有人处理
body: 这是我第三次联系支持团队，之前两次都没有明确答复。我对目前的响应非常不满意，请尽快升级处理。

subject: 服务中断影响整个团队
body: 工作区已经中断两个小时，所有成员都无法继续工作，业务被阻塞。请立即安排高级支持人员处理。

subject: 对客服响应时间非常不满意
body: 工单已经超过承诺时间仍没有进展，我们无法接受这样的服务，请主管介入并给出解决时间。

subject: 问题未解决准备取消合同
body: 关键故障持续一整天仍未恢复，如果今天不能解决，我们将取消续约并要求正式说明。

subject: Third email and still no resolution
body: This is my third email. The previous replies did not resolve anything and I am very unhappy with the response. Please escalate this case.

subject: Service outage is blocking our whole team
body: The workspace has been unavailable for two hours and every member is blocked from working. We need an urgent specialist response.

subject: Very unhappy with the support response time
body: The ticket is beyond the promised SLA and there is still no progress. A manager needs to take ownership and provide a resolution time.

subject: We may cancel the contract if this continues
body: A critical failure has continued all day. If it is not resolved today, we will cancel the renewal and request a formal explanation.

subject: 检测到新的 OAuth 应用授权
body: 一个第三方 OAuth 应用已获得账号访问权限。如非本人操作，请前往安全日志查看详情。此邮件由系统自动发送，请勿回复。

subject: 您的登录验证码是 483921
body: 验证码十分钟内有效，请勿转发给任何人。如果不是您本人操作，可以忽略本邮件。

subject: 七月产品功能更新摘要
body: 本月我们发布了全新的仪表盘和移动端体验，点击查看完整版本更新。若不希望继续接收，请点击退订。

subject: 限时优惠：年度套餐立减 30%
body: 夏季促销活动已经开始，升级年度套餐可获得折扣。优惠数量有限，立即购买。

subject: 您有 6 条未读动态
body: 登录通知中心即可查看新的团队动态、评论和成员活动。本消息为自动通知。

subject: 服务条款与隐私政策更新
body: 我们更新了服务条款和隐私设置，新条款将在下月生效。点击链接可以阅读完整内容。

subject: 完成调研可获得礼品卡
body: 邀请您参与二十五分钟产品调研，完成后可获得礼品卡。您的反馈将帮助我们改进产品。

subject: API v1 将于九月停止服务
body: 旧版 API 路径即将停止使用，请按照迁移指南升级到新版本。本邮件仅为服务变更通知。

subject: 欢迎使用 Docker，开始第一个项目
body: 欢迎加入。按照快速入门指南创建镜像、运行容器并探索产品功能。

subject: 六月付款收据
body: 这是您六月订阅自动生成的付款收据，附件可用于财务留档。此邮箱不接收回复。

subject: A third-party OAuth application was added
body: An OAuth application was authorized to access your account. Review the security log if this was not you. This is an automated notification.

subject: Your verification code is 483921
body: This code expires in ten minutes. Do not forward it to anyone. Ignore this email if you did not request it.

subject: July product update digest
body: This month we released a new dashboard and mobile experience. Read the full release notes or unsubscribe from future updates.

subject: Limited offer: save 30% on an annual plan
body: Our summer promotion is live. Upgrade to the annual plan to receive a discount while the offer lasts.

subject: You have 6 unread updates
body: Sign in to the notification center to see new team activity, comments, and member updates. This message was sent automatically.

subject: Updates to our service terms and privacy policy
body: We updated our service terms and privacy settings. The new terms take effect next month. Follow the link to read the details.

subject: Complete our survey and receive a gift card
body: You are invited to a twenty-five minute product survey. Your feedback will help us improve the product experience.

subject: API v1 paths retiring September 30
body: Legacy API paths will stop working in September. Follow the migration guide to move to the new version. This is a service notice.

subject: Welcome to Docker: create your first project
body: Welcome aboard. Follow the getting started guide to build an image, run a container, and explore product features.

subject: Receipt for your June payment
body: This is the automatically generated receipt for your June subscription. Keep the attachment for your records. Replies are not monitored.

subject: 同一账期出现两笔相同扣费
body: 本月同一个工作区出现两笔 299 元订阅扣费，请核对支付流水并协助退回重复的一笔。

subject: Two identical subscription charges in one billing cycle
body: Our workspace was charged USD 39 twice this month. Please verify both transactions and refund the duplicate.

subject: 退款申请通过后多久能到账
body: 退款申请已经创建，请问款项通常需要几个工作日原路退回？

subject: When will the approved refund arrive
body: The refund request has been created. How many business days does it normally take to return to the original payment method?

subject: 银行卡里有一笔待处理扣款
body: 账单中心只有一笔正式扣费，但银行卡还有一笔相同金额处于待处理状态，这是不是预授权？

subject: A second card charge is still pending
body: The billing center shows one settled payment, but my card has another identical pending amount. Could it be a temporary authorization hold?

subject: 取消订阅后仍然续费
body: 我在续费日前取消了订阅，但今天仍被扣款，请核验取消时间并处理退款。

subject: Charged after cancelling before renewal
body: I cancelled before the renewal date but was charged today. Please verify the cancellation timestamp and review the refund.

subject: 未授权的自动续费
body: 我们没有批准这次续费，账单却自动扣款了。请调查订阅状态，不要直接关闭工单。

subject: Unauthorized automatic renewal
body: We did not approve this renewal, but the subscription was charged automatically. Please investigate the subscription status.

subject: 跨币种企业合同退款
body: 企业合同使用美元线下付款，现在需要退回部分款项并换算成人民币，请转账单主管处理。

subject: Cross-currency enterprise contract refund
body: Our enterprise contract was paid offline in USD and now requires a partial refund converted to CNY. Please escalate it to billing.

subject: 退款核验需要哪些资料
body: 为了核对重复扣费，我应该提供订单号、支付时间还是支付渠道截图？

subject: Information required to verify a refund
body: For a duplicate-charge review, should I provide the order ID, payment time, amount, or a payment-channel screenshot?

subject: 续费后才取消能否退款
body: 扣款完成两天后我才取消订阅，这个账期还能申请退款吗？

subject: Cancellation happened after renewal
body: I cancelled two days after the renewal charge. Can the current billing cycle still be reviewed for a refund?

subject: 大额退款争议需要主管介入
body: 这笔企业账单金额很大，我们已经催促三次仍没有结果，请主管立即介入。

subject: Large refund dispute needs supervisor review
body: This enterprise charge is substantial and we have followed up three times without a resolution. A supervisor needs to review it.

subject: 查询退款处理状态
body: 工单显示正在退款，但银行卡还没有到账，请帮我确认目前处于哪一步。

subject: Check the current refund status
body: The ticket says the refund is processing, but nothing has reached my card. Please confirm the current stage.

subject: 付款后还没有生成发票
body: 我们三天前完成月付，账单中心仍没有发票记录，请确认正常生成时间。

subject: Invoice has not appeared after payment
body: We completed the monthly payment three days ago, but no invoice record is available. What is the normal generation time?

subject: 已开发票需要修改抬头
body: 发票已经开具，但公司名称填写错误，是否需要红冲或作废后重新开票？

subject: Change the title on an issued invoice
body: The invoice has already been issued with the wrong company name. Does it require cancellation or a credit-note process?

subject: 补录企业税号
body: 付款时漏填了税号，现在能否补录并重新生成正确的发票？

subject: Add a missing company tax ID
body: We omitted the tax ID during payment. Can it be added before a corrected invoice is generated?

subject: 年付合同什么时候开票
body: 企业年付合同已经签署，请问是付款后开票还是需要销售先确认合同信息？

subject: Invoice timing for an annual contract
body: Our annual enterprise contract is signed. Is the invoice issued after payment or after sales verifies the contract details?

subject: 采购订单和供应商准入
body: 采购部门需要报价单、PO 和供应商准入材料，请告诉我应提交哪些公司信息。

subject: Purchase order and vendor onboarding
body: Procurement needs a quotation, purchase order support, and vendor-onboarding documents. What company information should we provide?

subject: 需要付款收据用于报销
body: 这笔信用卡付款能否提供包含账单编号和付款日期的正式收据？

subject: Payment receipt required for expenses
body: Can you provide an official receipt containing the billing number and payment date for this card payment?

subject: 合同付款后如何开通
body: 公司准备通过合同转账付款，财务确认到账后多久可以开通服务？

subject: Activation after contract payment
body: We plan to pay by contract bank transfer. When can service be activated after finance confirms receipt?

subject: 修改发票注册地址和开户行
body: 账单资料中的注册地址和开户行已经变更，下一张发票应如何更新？

subject: Update invoice address and bank details
body: Our registered address and bank details have changed. How should we update them for the next invoice?

subject: 咨询年付采购折扣
body: 我们预计采购 120 个席位并签年付合同，希望销售提供正式报价和折扣方案。

subject: Annual procurement discount request
body: We expect to purchase 120 seats on an annual contract and need sales to provide a formal quotation and discount proposal.

subject: 账单金额与采购订单不一致
body: 本月账单金额和采购订单不一致，请协助核对账单编号、席位数和付款记录。

subject: Invoice amount does not match the purchase order
body: This month's invoice amount differs from our purchase order. Please reconcile the billing ID, seat count, and payment record.

subject: 密码重置链接已失效
body: 我点击最新的重置密码邮件仍提示链接过期，清理缓存后也没有解决。

subject: The latest password reset link is expired
body: The newest password-reset email still says the link is expired, even after I cleared the browser cache.

subject: 企业邮箱收不到验证码
body: 登录验证码没有进入收件箱或垃圾箱，可能被公司邮件网关拦截了。

subject: Verification code is missing from corporate email
body: The login code is not in the inbox or spam folder and may have been blocked by our corporate mail gateway.

subject: 多次输错密码后账号被锁
body: 管理员账号被临时锁定，生产工作区现在无法访问，请安全团队协助。

subject: Account locked after failed password attempts
body: The administrator account is locked and our production workspace is inaccessible. We need account-security assistance.

subject: 第三方 OAuth 授权异常
body: 连接报表应用时提示敏感权限授权失败，我们不会扩大权限，请帮助检查错误码。

subject: Third-party OAuth authorization error
body: Connecting our reporting app fails on a sensitive OAuth scope. We will not broaden permissions and need help checking the error.

subject: 发现未知设备登录
body: 审计日志出现陌生设备登录记录，我们怀疑账号被盗，请立即升级安全处理。

subject: Unknown device appeared in the login log
body: The audit log shows an unfamiliar device. We suspect account compromise and need immediate security escalation.

subject: 生产 API 持续超时
body: 从 10:20 开始所有订单接口都超时，影响三个工作区，请确认是否存在服务故障。

subject: Production API requests keep timing out
body: All order API requests have timed out since 10:20 and three workspaces are affected. Please check for an active incident.

subject: 核心任务大量执行失败
body: 过去半小时有六成同步任务失败，错误码 E503，状态页暂时没有公告。

subject: Most core synchronization jobs are failing
body: Sixty percent of sync jobs failed in the last 30 minutes with E503, while the status page has no notice.

subject: 部分成员无法通过 SSO 登录
body: 管理员可以登录，但新加入的成员使用 SSO 后一直返回工作区无权限。

subject: Some members cannot sign in through SSO
body: Administrators can sign in, but newly added members are denied workspace access after SSO authentication.

subject: 多因素认证陷入循环
body: 完成 MFA 后页面又回到验证码界面，已更换浏览器仍然重复。

subject: Multi-factor authentication is looping
body: After completing MFA, the page returns to the verification screen. The loop continues in another browser.

subject: 成员突然失去工作区访问权限
body: 一名成员昨天还能使用工作区，今天登录后所有项目都不可见，请协助排查权限。

subject: A member suddenly lost workspace access
body: A member could use the workspace yesterday, but all projects disappeared after signing in today. Please investigate access.

subject: Pro 是否支持多人团队工作区
body: 我们有 25 名成员，需要共享项目和任务，Pro 套餐是否支持在同一工作区协作？

subject: Does Pro support a shared team workspace
body: We have 25 members who need to share projects and tasks. Does Pro support collaboration in one workspace?

subject: Pro 的成员角色和权限
body: 能否给管理员、普通成员、只读成员和外部协作者配置不同访问权限？

subject: Member roles and permissions in Pro
body: Can Pro assign different access levels to administrators, members, read-only users, and external collaborators?

subject: 审计日志记录哪些操作
body: Pro 审计日志是否包含登录、权限变更、配置修改和数据导出？

subject: Which events are included in the audit log
body: Does the Pro audit log include sign-ins, permission changes, configuration updates, and data exports?

subject: Pro 是否提供 Webhook 和 API
body: 我们希望把业务事件同步到内部系统，Pro 套餐支持 Webhook、API 和数据同步吗？

subject: Webhook and API support in Pro
body: We need to send business events to an internal system. Does Pro provide webhooks, APIs, and data synchronization?

subject: Pro 能否接入企业 SSO
body: 团队使用统一身份平台，想确认 Pro 是否支持 SSO 和第三方身份集成。

subject: Enterprise SSO integration in Pro
body: Our team uses a central identity provider. Does Pro support SSO and third-party identity integration?

subject: Pro 的优先支持有什么区别
body: 升级后问题是否会进入优先队列？这种能力更适合哪些团队？

subject: How Pro priority support works
body: Will requests enter a priority queue after upgrading, and what type of team benefits from it?

subject: 成长型团队是否适合 Pro
body: 我们正在快速扩张，需要统一权限和追踪关键操作，Pro 是否适合这种使用场景？

subject: Is Pro suitable for a growing team
body: We are growing quickly and need centralized permissions and traceable operations. Is Pro suited to this scenario?

subject: Pro 能否保证满足行业合规
body: 采购希望确认 Pro 一定符合我们行业的合规要求，并需要安全白皮书和 DPA。

subject: Can Pro guarantee industry compliance
body: Procurement wants a guarantee that Pro satisfies our industry compliance rules and needs a security white paper and DPA.

subject: Pro 报价和合同咨询
body: 计划购买 80 个 Pro 席位，请提供价格、合同条款和采购周期。

subject: Pro pricing and contract inquiry
body: We plan to buy 80 Pro seats and need pricing, contract terms, and an estimated procurement timeline.

subject: 基础套餐与 Pro 功能差异
body: 主要关注团队协作、权限、审计和高级集成，请按这四项说明 Pro 的优势。

subject: Feature differences between Basic and Pro
body: We care about collaboration, permissions, auditing, and advanced integrations. Please explain Pro's advantages in these areas.

subject: 多次催促仍未收到处理结果
body: 这个问题已经跟进三次，客服每次都只说正在处理，我要求主管给出明确进展。

subject: Repeated follow-ups without a resolution
body: We have followed up three times and only receive processing updates. I need a supervisor to provide concrete progress.

subject: 故障导致生产业务完全中断
body: 核心页面从早上起无法访问，整个运营团队停工，请按最高优先级升级。

subject: Incident has completely blocked production
body: The core page has been unavailable since this morning and our operations team cannot work. Escalate at the highest priority.

subject: 重复扣费投诉一直没有处理
body: 重复扣费工单已经超过两天没有答复，如果今天还不处理我要正式投诉。

subject: Complaint about an unresolved duplicate charge
body: Our duplicate-charge ticket has had no response for two days. If it is not handled today, I will file a formal complaint.

subject: 要求法务和主管介入
body: 你们未经同意修改了服务条款，如果无法解释，我会让律师联系你们。

subject: Legal and supervisor review requested
body: You changed the service terms without consent. If this cannot be explained, our lawyer will contact you.

subject: 服务体验太差要求关闭账号
body: 连续出现故障且客服没有解决，我不再接受模板回复，请升级并协助关闭企业账号。

subject: Poor service and request to close the account
body: Repeated outages remain unresolved. I will not accept another template reply; escalate this and help close our enterprise account.

subject: 投诉数据导出和隐私处理
body: 我要求知道哪些个人数据被导出，并删除不应保留的数据，请交给隐私负责人。

subject: Complaint about exported personal data
body: I need to know what personal data was exported and request deletion of data that should not be retained. Route this to privacy.

subject: 高优先级工单已经超过 SLA
body: 生产问题超过两小时仍无人响应，已经违反高优先级 SLA，请主管接手。

subject: A high-priority ticket has missed its SLA
body: This production issue has had no response for more than two hours, missing the high-priority SLA. A supervisor must take over.

subject: 故障影响多个团队成员
body: 两个部门共 40 人无法提交任务，错误仍在扩大，请立即通知值班工程师。

subject: An incident affects multiple team members
body: Forty people across two departments cannot submit tasks and the impact is growing. Notify the on-call engineer immediately.

subject: 对客服处理方式非常不满
body: 客服没有阅读我提供的证据，反复让我执行相同步骤，我对这种处理方式非常不满。

subject: Very dissatisfied with support handling
body: Support ignored the evidence I provided and repeatedly asked me to perform the same steps. I am very dissatisfied.

subject: 要求明确负责人和下一次更新时间
body: 不要再回复正在处理中，请告诉我负责人、已经完成的排查和下一次更新时间。

subject: Demand for an owner and next update time
body: Do not send another generic processing message. Tell me the owner, completed investigation steps, and next update time.

subject: GitHub 验证码
body: 你的 GitHub 验证码是 482911，15 分钟后失效。

subject: GitHub Sudo verification code
body: Your GitHub verification code is 482911. It expires in 15 minutes.

subject: 新的 OAuth 应用已授权
body: 第三方 OAuth 应用已添加到你的账号，请前往安全日志查看。

subject: A new OAuth application was authorized
body: A third-party OAuth application was added to your account. Review it in the security log.

subject: 密码已修改通知
body: 这是一封自动安全通知，用于确认你的密码已经修改。

subject: Your password was changed
body: This is an automatic security notice confirming that your password was changed.

subject: 检测到新的登录
body: 系统检测到一台位于新加坡的 Windows 设备登录。

subject: New sign-in from Windows
body: We noticed a new sign-in from a Windows device in Singapore.

subject: 七月产品资讯
body: 查看本月产品动态、客户故事和即将举行的活动。

subject: July product newsletter
body: Read this month's product news, customer stories, and upcoming events.

subject: 限时升级优惠
body: 本周五前升级即可获得限时折扣。

subject: Limited-time 30% upgrade offer
body: Upgrade before Friday to receive a promotional discount.

subject: 邀请参加 AI 线上研讨会
body: 欢迎预约参加下周的产品线上研讨会。

subject: You're invited to our AI webinar
body: Reserve your seat for next week's online product webinar.

subject: 参与问卷帮助我们改进
body: 完成二十分钟问卷可获得礼品卡。

subject: Help us improve by taking a survey
body: Complete a 20-minute survey and receive a gift card.

subject: 服务条款更新通知
body: 服务条款将在下个月更新，你无需执行任何操作。

subject: Updated Terms of Service
body: Our Terms of Service will change next month. No action is required.

subject: 年度隐私政策通知
body: 本邮件用于说明年度隐私政策更新。

subject: Annual privacy policy notice
body: This message summarizes our annual privacy policy update.

subject: 已解决：API 延迟事件
body: API 延迟事件已经解决，这是一封自动状态通知。

subject: Resolved: API latency incident
body: The API latency incident has been resolved. This is an automated status notification.

subject: 本周末计划维护
body: 计划维护将在周六 02:00 UTC 开始。

subject: Scheduled maintenance this weekend
body: Planned maintenance starts Saturday at 02:00 UTC.

subject: 旧版 API 即将下线
body: API v1 将于 9 月 30 日下线，请查看迁移指南。

subject: Legacy API version retirement
body: API version v1 will retire on September 30. Review the migration guide.

subject: 5.2 版本现已发布
body: 最新桌面版本包含性能和安全改进。

subject: Version 5.2 is now available
body: The latest desktop release includes performance and security improvements.

subject: 欢迎使用新工作区
body: 你的工作区已经准备好，可根据入门指南邀请成员。

subject: Welcome to your new workspace
body: Your workspace is ready. Follow the getting-started guide to invite teammates.

subject: 付款收据 A-202607
body: 这是一封自动收据，用于确认订阅付款成功。

subject: Payment receipt #A-202607
body: This automatic receipt confirms your successful subscription payment.

subject: 发票已经生成
body: 发票 INV-8821 已生成，可前往账单中心下载。

subject: Your invoice is ready
body: Invoice INV-8821 is available for download in the billing center.

subject: 包裹已发货
body: 你的订单已经发出，可通过承运商查询物流。

subject: Your package has shipped
body: Your order is on the way. Track shipment with the carrier.

subject: 新的职位推荐
body: 有五个软件工程职位符合你保存的搜索条件。

subject: New jobs matching your profile
body: Five new software engineering positions match your saved search.

subject: 你有六条未读动态
body: 打开社交应用即可查看六条未读通知。

subject: You have six unread notifications
body: Open the social application to view your unread notifications.
